title: Cooking Pasta
content: Sophie decided to cook pasta for dinner after a long day at work. She filled a pot with water and waited for it to boil. While the pasta cooked, she prepared a simple tomato sauce with garlic and onions. Music played softly in the kitchen while she worked. The smell of the sauce made the apartment feel warm and comfortable. Sophie added cheese on top of the pasta and sat down near the window to eat. The meal was simple, but it tasted delicious after such a tiring day.
